memory_entries.text: In the product SQLite benchmark, tables are grouped by suffix: items_g1 is mainly Office Products, items_g2 is Electronics, items_g3 likely Musical Instruments. items_g2 schema includes ref_id, ttl, avg_rtg, prc (integer/list price source), prc_usd (dollar list price), str_nm, main_cat, feat_lst, img_ct; use img_ct>=1 for at least one catalog image and prc_usd>0 for positive dollar list price.
